raw_consumer_statement:
I received the initial statement with fraudulent charges on my Home Depot credit card back in XXXX XXXX XXXX I called to request that the fraudulent charges be removed and the Home Depot credit card account closed in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX. All charges on the account were fraudulent. 

The attached document runs sequentially from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, a period of 6 months, with multiple account numbers referenced in my name for home depot card services. 
It references four different account numbers ( I only had one home depot card ) Over the period of the six months, they opened 5 different investigations to try to get this resolved.

Again, I only had one Home Depot Credit card, that I asked by closed and cancelled in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX 

There was correspondence between XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX with multiple investigations Over the course of six months, this is still not resolved. 

I checked my XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX to see that my credit score has now dropped XXXX XXXX due to their inability to resolve this matter. 

This issue is still not resolved.
